company_profile.name: Astila Ceramic Pvt Ltd
company_profile.address: OP SOMNATHA PETROL PUMP, SR NO 357/P1 P2, JETPAR ROAD, RANGPAR, Morbi, Gujarat, 363642
company_profile.description: With eight advanced manufacturing plants in Morbi, Astila Ceramic Pvt Ltd has been producing exceptional tiles since January 2014. Specializing in 30x60cm porcelain and high-depth elevation wall tiles, they offer a diverse product range including Matt Porcelain Tiles (R9, R10, R11 surfaces), Multi mold outdoor tiles, and 12mm Heavy Duty Parking Tiles. Adhering to international quality standards, they export to over 15 countries and provide fast customization services.

media_assets.product_name: Transform Your Space With The Timeless Elegance Of Outdoor Tiles
Elevate Your Surroundings With The Timeless Elegance Of Porcelain Tiles

visual_features.presentation: lifestyle setting in a modern kitchen/dining area

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a modern kitchen or dining area featuring white ceramic tiles with subtle gold and brown veining, mimicking a marble look. These glossy tiles cover both the floor and a prominent wall section, creating a cohesive and elegant aesthetic. The room is furnished with a dark wooden dining table, two light wooden chairs, a black metal shelving unit, and a grey kitchen island with a stovetop, all contributing to a contemporary lifestyle setting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Modern kitchen/dining area with glossy white ceramic tiles featuring gold veining on both floor and wall, creating a luxurious marble look.

catalog_items.description: This post showcases Astila Ceramics' 'Elegant Collection' of tiles, designed to transform houses into homes. The collection includes stunning floor tiles and captivating wall designs, crafted to elevate living spaces with sophistication and comfort.

social_source.caption:
Welcome to Astila Ceramics, where we believe in turning houses into homes with our exquisite range of tiles. 

In this video, we're thrilled to showcase our elegant collection of tiles that will undoubtedly make your home sweet home even sweeter! From stunning floor tiles to captivating wall designs, our selection is crafted to elevate your living space to new heights of sophistication and comfort.

At Astila Ceramics, we take pride in being a leading tiles exporter in India, offering top-quality products that meet the highest standards of craftsmanship and durability. Our dedication to excellence ensures that each tile in our collection is not just a piece of decor, but a statement of style and luxury.

Whether you're renovating your kitchen, bathroom, or entire home, our diverse range of tiles has something to suit every taste and preference. With our commitment to customer satisfaction, you can trust that you're getting the best value for your investment.

Join us on a journey of home transformation and discover how our elegant collection of tiles can turn your space into a haven of beauty and tranquility. Don't just make a house; make it a home with Astila Ceramics.

Astila Ceramics - Your Trusted Tiles Exporter in India.

Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more home improvement tips and inspiration!

As a modernized enterprise, it integrates Research & Development, Production, Marketing sales and Services together.

Astila Ceramic specializes in exporting a Wall Tiles for many years in the world.

Astila ceramic has won the trust and loyalty from its buyers and distributors by scientific management system, excellent staff, powerful R & D competence & production capacity, especially the competitive prices. We are here to give your innovation in design with qualitative approach to insure that you are getting the true value for money as far as our product is concerned.

social_profiles.bio:
Greetings,

Let me introduce our vibrant venture to you. We're the creators behind exquisite Ceramic and Vitrified/Porcelain Wall, Floor, and Parking tiles. Together, we operate six state-of-the-art manufacturing plants, each a hub of innovation and quality craftsmanship. With over a decade of expertise under our belt, we've spread our artistic creations to more than 60 countries, earning accolades for our exceptional before and after-sales support.

Meet our company:
Picture a consortium of cutting-edge factories churning out porcelain & ceramic tiles at a remarkable pace of 10,000 square meters per day. In Morbi, our export prowess and tile quality rank among the top 10, a testament to our unwavering commitment to excellence.

Guiding principle:
Our compass always points towards fostering enduring partnerships. We're not just in it for a single transaction; our mantra revolves around delivering the finest quality, the most competitive prices, and unparalleled service.
